title: Let the Truth Be Told: Chronicles of A Few Good Men
original_title: Let The Truth Be Told: Chronicles of a Few Good Men
overview: Langston, Sean and Chase soon discover that they have more in common than most people realize. Baby mama drama, marital issues and underground secrets sync their beleaguered paths surrounding fatherhood.
